headline: Will Costco's famous hot dog combo stay at $1.50? CEO tells all
summary: In a world seemingly full of raw deals, the price of a hot dog and a soda at Costco hasn’t gone up in 40 years. Will it stay $1.50?

raw.headline: Will Costco's famous hot dog combo stay at $1.50? CEO tells all
raw.summary: In a world seemingly full of raw deals, the price of a hot dog and a soda at Costco hasn’t gone up in 40 years. Will it stay $1.50?

headline: Market Madness: Why JPMorgan, McDonald's are slam dunk stock picks
summary: Tipping off Yahoo Finance's "Market Madness" bracket tournament, Winthrop Capital CIO Adam Coons joins Julie Hyman to make the case for the first round of corporate match-ups, which includes JPMorgan Chase (JPM) vs. TJX (TJX) and McDonald's (MCD) vs. Disney (DIS).

headline: Wall Street Lunch: Rate Cut Hopes Crumble

headline: How The Walt Disney (DIS) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Targets And CEO Transition
summary: Walt Disney’s latest analyst updates center on price targets clustering around about $130, with one firm’s fair value estimate edging from roughly $130.57 to about $130.30. That small adjustment comes as research firms describe a mixed but generally constructive backdrop, pairing confidence in Disney’s intellectual property and multi platform reach with a more cautious tone reflected in single and double digit target trims. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets shape the...
